response.justification: This candidate is fundamentally misaligned with the role's core requirements. While demonstrating strong software engineering fundamentals and senior-level maturity, they lack the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows platforms—their resume shows only 6 months of professional C++ work in 2008. Additionally, there is no evidence of capital markets domain experience, fixed income derivatives knowledge, or strong SQL Server/Oracle expertise. Their entire career has been focused on full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js, D Lang) rather than systems programming or financial services software.
strengths: Demonstrates senior-level engineering maturity with 20+ years of professional experience and proven ability to mentor others through workshops and speaking engagements
Strong written and verbal communication skills evidenced by public technical talks and structured educational content creation
Proven expertise in CI/CD pipelines, Git, Docker, and DevOps infrastructure aligning with optional desirable skills
concerns: Only 6 months of documented professional C++ experience in 2008, far below the mandatory 5–10 year requirement, with no recent work despite continuing 18-year career
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking—entirely absent from employment history
Career centered on web/full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, JavaScript) with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle expertise or Windows platform systems development

key_factors.factor: C++ experience gap (6 months vs. 5–10 years required)
No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform evidence
